MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF EXPERT WITNESS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable and custodian of records is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, as amended by AB 3078, Chapter 171, Statutes of 2004, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing. The motion was filed October 31, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
